description_long: This bungalow features a low, single-story structure with a moderately pitched gable roof and a small covered porch on one side. The exterior walls are a light beige color, complemented by large blue-tinted windows on the front and sides, providing ample natural light. A red front door is centrally located, flanked by neatly trimmed green bushes and a paved walkway leading up to it. The property is bordered by a white picket fence on two sides, enhancing its suburban charm. The roof includes two chimneys and a carport or covered side area supported by posts. The surrounding yard is a simple green lawn, with stepping stones and minimal landscaping.
description: A single-story beige bungalow with a gable roof, large blue windows, a red front door, and a white picket fence, set on a green lawn with a small porch and carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red door, large blue windows, green bushes, and the main entrance walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white picket fence, two rear windows, and the dual chimneys on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door, additional windows, more bushes, and the continuation of the picket fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the carport/covered area, both chimneys, and the side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
